nasb.text: But that you also may know about my circumstances, how I am doing, Tychicus, the beloved brother and faithful minister in the Lord, will make everything known to you.

esv.text: So that you also may know how I am and what I am doing, Tychicus the beloved brother and faithful minister in the Lord will tell you everything.

cnv.text: 親愛的推基古弟兄是主裡忠心的僕人，他會把我的一切都告訴你們，使你們可以知道我的景況。

ccb.text: 至于我的近况，推基古会详细告诉各位。他是主内亲爱的弟兄和忠心的仆人。

csbs.text: 在主里蒙爱的弟兄、忠心的仆人特其库斯，会让你们明白一切，好让你们也知道有关我的事和我现在所做的事。
